form.formComment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win by a head at this track (1:56.10) beating Eurobank Hanover in 5yo on April 3 at $2.65 at the bell was 2nd-. Back in great order and is the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win by a head at this track (1:56.10) beating Eurobank Hanover in 5yo on April 3 at $2.65 at the bell was 2nd-. Back in great order and is the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Resumes today. His previous first-up run was successful when he won by a 0.8 m as favourite (Fr1) at Plainridge Park (1:57.20) beating Peach Cocktail in NW2PMLT on June 2 at $1.50. Prefer him later in the campaign.

formComments.comment: Resumes today. His previous first-up run was successful when he won by a 0.8 m as favourite (Fr1) at Plainridge Park (1:57.20) beating Peach Cocktail in NW2PMLT on June 2 at $1.50. Prefer him later in the campaign.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at this track, started this campaign 5th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 6th- beaten 13 m by Safe Conduct (1:54.30) on March 16 at $36.35. Then last outing 7th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 8th- beaten 10 m by Ghostly Casper (1:55.40) on April 5 at $26.50. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 9 m finishing ninth behind Kadiddle at this track over 1609m in a 5yo on December 15 at $28.80. Nicely placed to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 9 m finishing ninth behind Kadiddle at this track over 1609m in a 5yo on December 15 at $28.80. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 2 m fourth behind Crystal Baller at this track over 1609m last start. Before that was beaten 3.5 metres seventh again at this track same class on March 15. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Last start 6th over 1609m at this track was 6th- at the bell, beaten 10 m by Pennteller Hanover (1:55.20) in 4yo on April 5 at $6.95. At the start before 4th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th- beaten 6 m by Myfriendjose (1:54.40) on March 22 at $37.55. Going okay so keep him safe.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd over 1609m at this track was 3rd- at the bell, beaten 1.0 m by Passarino (1:55.20) in 4yo on April 5 at $5.50. Strong prospects.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 4th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was leading beaten 1.5 m by Devil's Arch (1:54.00) in 4yo on May 19 at $2.45. Capable of playing a major role despite the layoff.

form.formComment: Last start 6th over 1609m at this track was 5th- at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Ghostly Casper (1:55.40) on April 5 at $44.50. Two runs back 4th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th- beaten 6 m by Willys Home Run (1:54.00) in 4yo on March 29 at $13.10. Needs to lift.
